channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Thai-Myanmar Border Sees Increased Efforts to Shut Down Online Scam Centers
item.description: Thailand and China step up cooperation to address the online scam problem, with a top Chinese security official visiting the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Elon Musk's DOGE Team Faces Challenges with Government Systems
item.description: Young software engineers from Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) are infiltrating U.S. government agencies to modernize systems and eliminate wasteful spending, but they may encounter COBOL code that requires a different approach.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
